name: CTO Tools
description: Engineering leadership and security tools for CTOs, including weekly team reviews and risk correlation

tools.name: weekly_review
tools.description: Structured framework for conducting weekly engineering team reviews with commit analysis and concise output suitable for stakeholders

tools.name: security_review
tools.description: Correlate security alerts across multiple tools with policy context. Identifies, scores, and prioritizes security risks from SAST/DAST, CSPM, threat intel, and policy violations.

tools.name: list_connectors
tools.description: List all available security tool connectors and their status

tools.name: configure_connector
tools.description: Configure a new security tool connector (SAST, DAST, CSPM, threat intel, or policy source)
